mapper.select: SELECT id, name, age, gender, phone, email, position, department, salary, address, entry_date AS entryDate, status, avatar FROM employee ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, name, age, gender, phone, email, position, department, salary, address, entry_date AS entryDate, status, avatar FROM employee WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, age, gender, phone, email, position, department, salary, address, entry_date AS entryDate, status, avatar FROM employee WHERE name LIKE concat('%',#{name},'%') ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, name, age, gender, phone, email, position, department, salary, address, entry_date AS entryDate, status, avatar FROM employee WHERE gender = #{gender} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, name, age, gender, phone, email, position, department, salary, address, entry_date AS entryDate, status, avatar FROM employee WHERE department = #{department} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, name, age, gender, phone, email, position, department, salary, address, entry_date AS entryDate, status, avatar FROM employee WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee(name, age, gender, phone, email, position, department, salary, address, entry_date, status, avatar) VALUES (#{name}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{position}, #{department}, #{salary}, #{address}, #{entryDate}, #{status}, #{avatar})
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET name = #{name}, age = #{age}, gender = #{gender}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, position = #{position}, department = #{department}, salary = #{salary}, address = #{address}, entry_date = #{entryDate}, status = #{status}, avatar = #{avatar} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, age, gender, phone, email, position, department, salary, address, entry_date AS entryDate, status, avatar FROM employee ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
